Name: Contact Us (2-step)
Notes: CF7 form ID: 11830. Step 1: message textarea. Step 2: request-type dropdown, name, email, phone. Endpoint: /wp-json/contact-form-7/v1/contact-forms/11830/feedback

Name: Free Assessment
Notes: CF7 form ID: 68942. Fields: name (text-name), email (text-email), phone (text-phone), transaction_type dropdown. Custom select UI.

Name: Mortgage Calculator Quiz
Notes: Multi-step JS quiz app. Steps: purpose → applicant details → financials → contact. Renders in minimal shell (logo + back arrow). JS-loaded content.

Name: Assessment Quiz Popup
Trigger: User clicks 'Get a Free Assessment' CTA
Notes: Popup Maker popups (#popmake-11791, #popmake-14062). Property price → deposit check → circumstances → contact fields.

Name: LVR Calculator Broker Form
Notes: Gravity Form ID: 10 (gform_wrapper_10). Appears conditionally. Fields: full name, contact number, email.

Name: YTD Calculator Broker Form
Notes: Gravity Form ID: 9 (gform_9). Appears conditionally. Fields: full name, contact number, email.

Name: Landing Page Forms
Notes: Appears on: /first-home-buyer-loans/, /refinance-home-loan/, /get-a-stress-free-first-home-loan/, /lower-your-rate/, /your-property-investment-journey/. Standard fields: name, email, phone.

Name: Mortgage Report Request
Notes: Home affordability report generator. TBD: confirm form fields and destination.

Name: Mortgage Calculator
Sends To: Display only (no data sent until contact step = F-03)
Notes: Multi-step quiz: purpose, applicant type, state, dependents, income, deposit.

Name: Equity Calculator
Notes: Fields: loan amount (#equity_loan_amount), property value (#equity_property_value), type (Investment 90% / Owner Occupier 80%). Outputs: LVR, max LVR, available equity.

Name: LVR Calculator
Notes: Fields: loan amount (#lvr_loan_amount), property value (#lvr_property_value). Output: LVR percentage.

Name: YTD Calculator
Notes: Fields: start date (#ytd_started_job), end date (#ytd_end_job), YTD income (#ytd_gross_income). Output: annualized income.

Name: Mortgage vs Rent
Notes: Field: weekly rent (IMask formatted). Outputs: 5-year total (#fiveYearsPrice), affordable mortgage (#affordPrice). Uses 6% rate, 30yr term.

Name: Deposit Calculator
Notes: Fields: deposit amount, home price, rate, term. Slider: deposit percentage (nouislider). Outputs: deposit %, home price, monthly payment.

Name: Stamp Duty QLD
Notes: Multi-step: state, price, purpose, security type, transaction type, first home buyer, primary residence, foreign purchaser. Outputs: total fees, stamp duty, transfer fee, etc.

Name: LMI Calculator
Notes: Quiz-style calculator with radio buttons and currency inputs. TBD: document specific fields.

Name: Extra Repayments
Notes: Contains deposit amount input that redirects to /deposit-calculator for full calculation.
